popularStory.headline: BIO
popularStory.description:
BIO:  Count of Aosta, 1025; of Maurienne, 1027; acquired Chablis, 1035.

** from http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/SAVOY.htm#Oddondied1060A as of 3/30/2016

HUMBERT, son of --- ([970/75]-1 Jul [1047/51] …

zh.Chambéry, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, France: 法國o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊哈恩貝利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Conte Umberto I Biancamano di Savoia於大約0980年出生在法國o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊哈恩貝利時，他的父親Amedeo Conte di Savoia41歲，母親Adela di Moriana37歲。他於1000年之前與Ancilla von Lenzburg結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1047年7月1日在法國o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊沙吉讓安-德-莫瑞安享年68歲，埋葬在法國薩伏伊。

zh-hans.Chambéry, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, France: 法国o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊哈恩貝利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Conte Umberto I Biancamano di Savoia于大约0980年出生在法国o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊哈恩貝利时，他的父亲Amedeo Conte di Savoia41岁，母亲Adela di Moriana37岁。他于1000年之前与Ancilla von Lenzburg结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1047年7月1日在法国o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊沙吉讓安-德-莫瑞安享年68岁，埋葬在法国薩伏伊。

nameMeanings.name: di
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mandarin form of the surname 狄, a term referring to the tribes in ancient northern China: (i) from Di (狄), the name of an ancient state (thought to have been located in Hebei or Shandong province), which was granted to Xiao Bo or Kao Bo by King Cheng of Zhou (reigned 1042–1021  BC ). (ii) adopted as a surname by the Ku Di (庫狄) family during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) traced back to other minority ethnic groups in ancient northwestern China.

Mandarin form of the Chinese surname 邸, meaning ‘official residence’ in Chinese: (i) from placename Di (邸), the name of a county (unidentified location). (ii) said to be borne by some descendants of Kujula Kadphises (called 丘就郤 or 邸就郤 in Chinese, 30–c. 80 AD ), founder of the Kushan Empire (one branch of the Yuezhi people originating from western China) located in Central Asia during the Eastern Han dynasty (25–220 AD ).

variants.name: Chi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Dong, Yun, Cheng, Jae, Yong, Cheng Chung, Chi, Chun, Duk, Fang, Feng.  Korean Chung, Chong, Jae Hong, Moon, Myong, Pong, Shen, Yoo, Byung, Chang, Chol, Chong Hun.  Southeast Asian Phi, Hung, Ly, Tu, Denh, Do Van, Duong, Hao, Kieu, Mui, Nga, Phat.

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 池, meaning ‘moat’ in ancient Chinese: (i) acquired as a surname by people who lived beside a moat. (ii) from Chi (池), said to be the name of an ancient state (of unknown location and period). (iii) from the personal name Chi (池), personal name of a son of an official in the state of Qin during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 遲, meaning ‘late’ in Chinese: (i) borne by descendants of Chi Ren (遲任), a person who lived during the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ). (ii) shortened form of the Chinese compound surname Yu-Chi (尉遲), originally the name of a tribe from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China. (iii) from the second element of the personal name Zi Chi (子遲), style name of Fan Xu, a student of Confucius (551–479  BC ).

nameMeanings.name: Savoia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Aldo, Salvatore, Antonio, Dante, Enzo, Franco, Italo, Piero, Reno, Umberto, Vito.
Italian: habitational name from Savoy, in France, named Savoia in Italian. See Savoie .

variants.name: Savoie
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Pierre, Marcel, Damien, Jacques, Normand, Raoul, Alphonse, Antoine, Armand, Julien, Alcee.
French: habitational name from Savoy (French name Savoie), a region in the southeastern part of France, or from (La) Savoie, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare Savoy .

History: Savoy was consolidated in the 11th century by count Humbert the White-Handed (Humbert aux blanches-mains). He was the founder of the great European noble house of Savoy, with large holdings of territory in France, Switzerland, and present-day Italy.

nameMeanings.name: Umberto
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: See Humbert . The former Italian royal family is descended from the Blessed Umberto of Savoy ( 1136–88 ).

nameMeanings.name: Biancamano
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Italian (southern): from the personal name or nickname Biancamano, literally ‘white hand’.

en.lifeSummary: When Conte Umberto I Biancamano di Savoia was born about 0980, in Chambéry, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, France, his father, Amedeo Conte di Savoia, was 41 and his mother, Adela di Moriana, was 37. He married Ancilla von Lenzburg before 1000. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 1 July 1047, in Saint-Jean-de-Maurienne, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, France, at the age of 68, and was buried in Savoie, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Conte Umberto I Biancamano di Savoia est né environ 0980, à Chambéry, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Amedeo Conte di Savoia, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Adela di Moriana, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Ancilla von Lenzburg avant 1000. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 1 juillet 1047, à Saint-Jean-de-Maurienne, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, France, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Savoie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Conte Umberto I Biancamano di Savoia um 0980 in Chambéry, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Amedeo Conte di Savoia 41 und seine Mutter Adela di Moriana 37. Er hat vor 1000 Ancilla von Lenzburg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 1. Juli 1047 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Saint-Jean-de-Maurienne, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich und wurde in Savoyen, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Conte Umberto I Biancamano di Savoia è nato il circa 0980 nel Chambéry, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, il suo padre, Amedeo Conte di Savoia, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Adela di Moriana, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Ancilla von Lenzburg prima del 1000. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 1 luglio 1047, nel Saint-Jean-de-Maurienne, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Savoia, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Conte Umberto I Biancamano di Savoiaが約0980年にフランスルhoネ-アルペスサボイチャンブeリーで生まれた時，父Amedeo Conte di Savoiaは41歳，母Adela di Morianaは37歳であった。1000年以前にAncilla von Lenzburgと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1047年7月1日にフランスルhoネ-アルペスサボイサイント-ジェアン-デ-マアウリーンで68歳で死去し，フランスサボイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Conte Umberto I Biancamano di Savoia(이)가 대략 0980년 프랑스 ho니-알프스 서아보이 챔브e리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Amedeo Conte di Savoia(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Adela di Moriana(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1000년 이전 Ancilla von Lenzburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1047년 7월 1일 프랑스 ho니-알프스 서아보이 세인트-j이-데-모리니에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 서아보이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Conte Umberto I Biancamano di Savoia nasceu aproximadamente 0980, em Chambéry, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Amedeo Conte di Savoia, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Adela di Moriana, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Ancilla von Lenzburg antes 1000. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de julho de 1047, em Saint-Jean-de-Maurienne, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, França, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Savoie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Conte Umberto I Biancamano di Savoia родился около 0980 г. в местности чамбeри, савои, рoне-алпесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Amedeo Conte di Savoia было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Adela di Moriana, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Ancilla von Lenzburg перед 1000 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 1 июля 1047 г. в местности сеинт-джин-де-мауриенн, савои, рoне-алпесь, Франция в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности савои, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Conte Umberto I Biancamano di Savoia nació aproximadamente 0980, en Chambéry, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Amedeo Conte di Savoia, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Adela di Moriana, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Ancilla von Lenzburg antes de 1000. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 1 de julio de 1047, en Saint-Jean-de-Maurienne, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Savoie, Francia.
